item.title: KOL Views Q&A: Lilly’s Foundayo may gain ground on Novo's Wegovy in obesity – but oral GLP-1s still face uphill climb
item.description: FirstWord spoke with obesity expert Scott Kahan about US approval of Eli Lilly's Foundayo to treat obesity, and how the competition with Novo's oral Wegovy and other oral GLP-1 therapies is likely to shape up.

item.title: Vital Signs: What to watch at AACR
item.description: FirstWord takes stock of what will be making headlines ahead of next week's American Association for Cancer Research meeting in San Diego, including first data reveals for new programmes from Gilead Sciences, Merck & Co., and Novartis.
